questions.text: Most of the Earth's water is found in:
questions.explanation: About 97% of Earth's water is in oceans. Only 3% is freshwater, and most of that is frozen in glaciers.
Infiltration is the process of water seeping into the ground, which replenishes groundwater.

questions.correctAnswer: The level below which the ground is saturated with water.
questions.explanation: Water table is the upper limit of groundwater. It varies from place to place and season to season.

questions.text: The process of water changing into vapour is called ________.
questions.explanation: Evaporation is the process where liquid water changes into water vapour due to heating.
